title: Etiquet
content:
There was a young man so benighted,
     He never knew when he was slighted;
        He would go to a party,
        And eat just as hearty,
     As if he'd been really invited.
meaning:
"Etiquet" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
